title: OP pickaxes
body:
# OP pickaxes

This is a simple mod for fabric and neoforge using architectury API that adds pickaxes

If you want me to adapt it for another minecraft version or modloader, or add a pickaxe, just file a github issue and i will try to answer it

## Items

### Stats
#### Dirt pickaxe
- Durability : 32
- Mining speed : 2,147,483,647
- Damage : 1
- Enchantment lvl : 1
- Force : Netherite
- Repair items : Dirt
- Speciality : Mines every pickaxe block (stone, ores, etc) instantly

#### Coal pickaxe
- Durability : 128
- Mining speed : 3
- Damage : 6
- Enchantment lvl : 1
- Force : Netherite
- Repair items : Coal and Charcoal
- Speciality : Smelts mined items
